commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh I beseech you, O LORD, remember now how I have walked before you in truth and with a perfect heart, and have done that which is good in your sight. And Hezekiah wept bitterly. Before thee. The saints of the old law frequently mention their good works, (Psalm vii. , and 2 Esdras xiii. ) which is less common in those of the new. When God rewards our good works, he only crowns his own gifts. (Calmet) Ezechias had sincerely desired to please God, though he might have given way to some imperfections,.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
